LabelWidget.Name: ShittyLog.Title
LabelWidget.Text: Shitty Creatures Log

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_1
LabelWidget.Text: • New event added in the mod: Green Night and its hordes of infected

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_2
LabelWidget.Text: • New creatures were added: new infected, 2 Digimon, and bandits (4 of the bandits are unique and can ally with the player and protect them).

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_3
LabelWidget.Text: • New firearms added

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_4
LabelWidget.Text: • Now you can manage the inventory of allied npcs and place any object inside there

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_5
LabelWidget.Text: • 2 new buttons were added to manage the configuration of the npcs chase music to activate and deactivate their music if you want them to be heard or not in your world, now they will be in the configuration button and there will be a button called 'Shitty Creatures settings' and when you click it the 2 buttons will appear along with their saved changes when you exit the game

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_6
LabelWidget.Text: • New clothes added

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_7
LabelWidget.Text: • Now the enslaved infected Flying Infected 1, Flying Infected Boss, Infected Bear can now be ridden, so enjoy the journey in the air and on the ground with them

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_8
LabelWidget.Text: • Healing methods were added: Antidote Bucket (cures poison) and the added healing mechanism for creatures with poison and Anti-Flu Bucket (cures the flu) and health healing kits with its creature healing mechanism (the medium one partially heals health and the large one completely heals health)

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_9
LabelWidget.Text: • The artificial intelligence of normal and infected creatures has been improved, they will no longer use the newchase to control ranged weapons and others, they will now be able to use any ranged and firearm weapons, throwable objects and the management of switching from weapon to melee

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_10
LabelWidget.Text: • The translations were corrected and improved to sound more fluid and understandable.

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_11
LabelWidget.Text: • Digimon without powers, such as Gaomon, Gumdramon, Hawkmon, and Gabumon, will now be able to wield ranged and melee weapons.

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_6_12
LabelWidget.Text: • The flu mechanism for creatures was added; now creatures will catch the flu just like the player.

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_5_1
LabelWidget.Text: • Added new weapons: Flamethrower, Scythe, Trident, Repeating Crossbow, Poison Bomb, Item Cannon

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_5_2
LabelWidget.Text: • Added new NPCs: Digimon, Alliance members, Muerte members, Pirates, Infected (zombies)

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_5_3
LabelWidget.Text: • Added music system (background music, chase music for enemies)

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_5_4
LabelWidget.Text: • Added new items: Xiaomi refrigerator, air conditioner, Command Stick, zombie necklace

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_5_5
LabelWidget.Text: • Improved pack and pursuit system; infected can now use ranged weapons

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_5_6
LabelWidget.Text: • BetelGammamon now appears only in autumn/winter

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_5_7
LabelWidget.Text: • New wallpapers and improved textures for Ricardo, Carl Johnson, Ballestadora Musculosa

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_5_8
LabelWidget.Text: • Fixed bugs: music button disappearing, air conditioner shadow, door interaction, etc.

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_5_9
LabelWidget.Text: • Added poisoning mechanic and old stone/wood/lava weapons/tools

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_4_1
LabelWidget.Text: • Added Headcrab Bloody Human, El Arquero

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_4_2
LabelWidget.Text: • Improved Carl Johnson, El Marihuanero, El Marihuanero Mamón designs

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_4_3
LabelWidget.Text: • Improved Ricardo's texture (fixed unpainted edges)

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_4_4
LabelWidget.Text: • Added shooting behavior: El Arquero, El Ballestero, El Marihuanero Mamón now use their own ammo

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_3_1
LabelWidget.Text: • Added new characters: Conker, Beavis and Butt‑head, Hombre Lava, Hombre Agua

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_3_2
LabelWidget.Text: • Modified El Marihuanero Mamón's shirt to reflect Rastafarian essence

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_2_1
LabelWidget.Text: • Added GTA characters: Claude Speed, Tommy Vercetti

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_2_2
LabelWidget.Text: • Added 4 beings from the afterlife

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_2_3
LabelWidget.Text: • Added full moon/new moon transformation for Lider Caláverico Supremo

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_2_4
LabelWidget.Text: • Improved NPC sounds (La Muerte X, El Marihuanero Mamón)

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_2_5
LabelWidget.Text: • Claude, Tommy and El Marihuanero Mamón now have items/weapons

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_2_6
LabelWidget.Text: • Changed audio route for Paco (now uses its own name)

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_1_1
LabelWidget.Text: • Added Tank model (from dayzmod)

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_1_2
LabelWidget.Text: • New character: Fumador Químico and his muscular version (Tank)

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_1_3
LabelWidget.Text: • Full moon/new moon transformation for Fumador Químico → Brawny (allied)

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_1_4
LabelWidget.Text: • Added new sounds to NPCs

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_0_1
LabelWidget.Text: • Added 4 humans

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_0_2
LabelWidget.Text: • Models, textures, and audios from dayzmod mod

LabelWidget.Name: Line1_0_0_3
LabelWidget.Text: • Compatible with 2.3 and 2.4
